Listing Works

  1. LUDUS. by canniliciuscore

    Fandoms: Young Sherlock (TV 2026), Sherlock Holmes - Arthur Conan Doyle, Sherlock Holmes & Related Fandoms  
    • Teen And Up Audiences
    • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
    • M/M
    • Work in Progress

    01 Jun 2026

    Tags
    • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
    • Sherlock Holmes/James Moriarty
    • Sherlock Holmes & James Moriarty
    • Sherlock Holmes & John Watson
    • Sherlock Holmes
    • James Moriarty
    • John Watson
    • Silas Holmes
    • Angst and Hurt/Comfort
    • Lovers to Enemies
    • Friends to Lovers
    • Platonic Relationships
    • Platonic Soulmates
    • Angst
    • Domestic Fluff
    Summary

    What if you were different? Would you still stay?

    We cannot force anyone to remain. But when the person who matters most chooses to leave, it’s impossible not to wonder whether things might have turned out differently under other circumstances. If they had looked beyond what seemed like selfishness. If they had understood that perhaps walking away was never an act of indifference, but a desperate attempt to protect the person they loved.

    This is a story about two people who found each other when no one else could truly understand them and who, because of that, were destined to change one another forever. It is a story about admiration turning into attachment, affection threatening to become something more, and choices born from fear rather than reason. Because loving someone does not always mean accepting them, and sometimes the brightest souls are also the most terrified when forced to confront what they truly feel.

    Perhaps the real tragedy is that, at one point, they could have been something more—and neither of them had the courage to find out what that was.

    Language:
    English
    Words:
    1,186
    Chapters:
    1/?
    Kudos:
    1
    Bookmarks:
    1
    Hits:
    2

    Two interpretations of a single sentence.

  4. school chums by SupposedToBeWriting

    Fandoms: Sherlock Holmes - Arthur Conan Doyle  
    • Teen And Up Audiences
    • No Archive Warnings Apply
    • Gen
    • Complete Work

    01 Jun 2026

    Tags
    • No Archive Warnings Apply
    • Sherlock Holmes & John Watson
    • Sherlock Holmes
    • John Watson
    • Canon Divergent AU
    • Hurt/Comfort
    • Pre-Canon
    • AU - Watson and Holmes knew each other in Uni
    • Friendship
    Summary

    After an arduous battle with a gunshot wound and enteric fever, Captain John Watson is finally returning to London. In retrospect, the surgeons at the base hospital should have kept him a few more weeks, because it's a rather weak Watson that staggers off the ship. He expects no one to greet his arrival - after all, he left England with no close connections to friends or family. Such is his surprise when he finds that someone is waiting for him at the pier: a brilliant and eccentric old friend from medical school, Sherlock Holmes.

    Language:
    English
    Words:
    4,392
    Chapters:
    1/1
    Comments:
    1
    Kudos:
    5
    Hits:
    27

    Placing Meredith and Sybil Arbiter into the Watson is a Time Lord timeline! Because I can’t read anything and be normal about it.

    Knowledge of the characters I made up as well as the AU this is drawing from would probably be useful.

  8. 【授权翻译】Sherlock & Co. 台词本中英文对照 by jailyn_smile

    Fandoms: Sherlock & Co. (Podcast)  
    • Not Rated
    • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
    • Gen
    • Work in Progress

    31 May 2026

    Tags
    • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
    • Sherlock Holmes/John Watson
    • Sherlock Holmes & John Watson
    • 中文翻译 | Translation in Chinese
    Summary

    My name is Dr. John Watson, once of the British Army Northumberland Fusilier Regiment, now a true crime podcaster based in Central London.

    I don't have much experience in criminology, so this is mostly a record of how I met possibly the most brilliant and bizarre person I have ever (and will ever) know. Join me as I document the adventures of Sherlock Holmes.

    我是John Watson医生，曾是英国陆军诺森伯兰燧发枪手团的一员，现在是伦敦市中心的一名真实犯罪的播客。我在犯罪学方面没有太多经验，所以这主要是记录我是如何遇到可能是我过去和将来认识的最聪明、最怪异的人。和我一起记录Sherlock Holmes的冒险经历吧。

    Language:
    中文-普通话 國語
    Words:
    372,833
    Chapters:
    33/142
    Comments:
    25
    Kudos:
    49
    Bookmarks:
    23
    Hits:
    1,621

  9. The one with the unspeakable horrors. by Hattie_Hatter

    Fandoms: Sherlock (BBC TV 2010), Sherlock Holmes: The Awakened (Video Game)  
    • Mature
    • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
    • Gen, M/M
    • Work in Progress

    31 May 2026

    Tags
    • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
    • Sherlock Holmes & John Watson
    • Mycroft Holmes & Sherlock Holmes

    • Mycroft Holmes & Greg Lestrade

    • Mycroft Holmes & Sherlock Holmes & Greg Lestrade & John Watson

    • John Watson
    • Mycroft Holmes
    • Greg Lestrade
    • Temporary Character Death
    • Hurt/Comfort
    • Emotional Hurt/Comfort
    • Hurt Sherlock Holmes
    • Protective John Watson
    • Protective Mycroft Holmes
    • Angst
    • Eventual Happy Ending
    • POV Alternating
    • Eventual Mycroft Holmes/Greg Lestrade
    • Implied/Referenced Suicide
    • Hospitals
    • Mental Instability
    • Other Additional Tags to Be Added
    • Rating May Change
    • Dead Dove: Do Not Eat
    • Suicide Attempt
    • Sharing a Bed
    • It Gets Worse Before It Gets Better
    • Hurt John Watson
    • Protective Greg Lestrade
    • Suicidal Thoughts
    • Suicidal Sherlock Holmes
    • Self-Harm
    Summary

    John and Mycroft had only let Sherlock out of there sight for just a moment but something horrible clearly happened during that time.
    Now John and Mycroft are left to wonder what exactly did happen... And if Sherlock will ever recover from it.

    ⚠️ IMPORTANT! ⚠️
    Hey, reader, just before you go any further I want to give you a quick warning.
    This story is going to deal with some pretty dark stuff, especially when it comes to suicide. This will include discussions of suicide, scenes of attempted suicide, depictions of suicidal thoughts, mentions of past suicides, and scenes of main characters committing suicide (the last one is only in a dream, so no none of the main characters actually die dies, but still.)
    If you are at all sensitive to depictions of suicide than please skip this.

    Also! The rating is not for sex, this is purely about disturbing content. So wether that's a negative or a positive for you, just keep it in mind.

    (Update: I have officially finished all 40 chapters! Now all that's left is to edit them and post them! Going forward you can expect a new chapter every Saturday and Sunday.)

    Series
    • Part 2 of Very Dramatic Sherlock Stories
    Language:
    English
    Words:
    35,932
    Chapters:
    25/40
    Comments:
    31
    Kudos:
    48
    Bookmarks:
    7
    Hits:
    1,947

    Summary

    𝘈 𝘴𝘵𝘰𝘳𝘺 𝘰𝘧 𝘣𝘳𝘶𝘪𝘴𝘦𝘴 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘧𝘢𝘥𝘦, 𝘣𝘰𝘯𝘥𝘴 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘥𝘦𝘦𝘱𝘦𝘯, 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘸𝘢𝘳𝘮𝘵𝘩 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘸𝘢𝘪𝘵𝘴 𝘱𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘦𝘯𝘵𝘭𝘺 𝘰𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘰𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘳 𝘴𝘪𝘥𝘦 𝘰𝘧 𝘱𝘢𝘪𝘯.

    Everyday life after marriage.

    Sherlock and Shruti work cases side by side as she faces health struggles, until the revelation of her 𝘱𝘳𝘦𝘨𝘯𝘢𝘯𝘤𝘺 reshapes their world. They learn how to hold each other in both 𝘱𝘢𝘪𝘯 and 𝘭𝘰𝘷𝘦.

    At the Roy Palace, Shruti and Sherlock uncover more of each other than they 𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘳 meant to reveal.Their Indian wedding blossoms in joy and color. Grief follows the loss of her grandmother.

    After the birth, Shruti struggles to embrace motherhood. Amid these fragile beginnings, she and Sherlock must find their way into 𝘱𝘢𝘳𝘦𝘯𝘵𝘩𝘰𝘰𝘥—together.

    Series
    • Part 3 of A Study in Love and Deduction

  14. Been Waiting For You Ever Since (You've Been Gone) by catastrophicblues7, thedogbard

    • Post-Season/Series 04
    • Post-Episode: s04e03 The Final Problem (Sherlock BBC TV)
    • Episode: s03e02 The Sign of Three (Sherlock BBC TV)
    • Fix-It for Episode: s03e02 The Sign of Three (Sherlock BBC TV)
    • Post-Episode: s02e01 A Scandal in Belgravia (Sherlock BBC TV)
    • Song: coney island (Taylor Swift)
    • Song: If This Was a Movie (Taylor Swift)
    • Song: You Are In Love (Taylor Swift)
    • Song: December 1963 (Oh What a Night)
    • Dancing On The Ceiling by Lionel Ritchie
    • Established Relationship
    • Romance
    • Sherlock Holmes Being Sherlock Holmes
    • Song: Haunted (Taylor Swift)
    • river lea by adele
    • Based on an Adele Song
    • Anyone by roxette
    • june afternoon by roxette
    • Mary Lives
    • Song: Delicate (Taylor Swift)
    Summary

    How is it even possible? Only this morning you’d kissed him, holding onto the lapels of his coat for balance while his hand tangled through your hair. Then you’d sent him out into the world with a final kiss pressed to his cheek, thinking you’d passed through the storm successfully. Stupid you. The East Wind might’ve passed, but there’s three other directions and a multitude of evils out there, and Sherlock’s really, really good at finding those damn evils. He attracts them.
    You get it, kind of. After all, he is attractive.
    *
    Eight months after The Final Problem, Sherlock gets amnesia when he’s injured on a mysterious case. Unfortunately, he doesn’t remember what the case is. Or that he has a girlfriend. And why the hell is John carting a baby around on his hip?

    Series
    • Part 18 of Sherlock x Female Reader stories
    Language:
    English
    Words:
    36,795
    Chapters:
    5/8
    Comments:

    Bookmarks:
    1
    Hits:

    Summary

    By the time they reached Baker Street, Watson’s stomach churned. Queasiness due to pain was hardly unusual, given his continual aches. This, though, was rather more serious than usual.

    “Holmes,” Watson managed, head spinning. “I feel somewhat ill.”

    Summary

    How Doctor Watson started his crime podcast career with Sherlock Holmes.

    A crossover blending canon ACD and podcast.

    Language:

    Summary

    Sherlock had never liked thunderstorms but getting to hang out with his older brother had at least made them bearable. Now Mycroft had left for boarding school, leaving him on his own for the first time in a long time.

  20. how can we go back to be friends by cherry67

    Fandoms: Young Sherlock (TV 2026)  
    • Not Rated
    • No Archive Warnings Apply
    • M/M
    • Complete Work

    29 May 2026

    Tags
    • No Archive Warnings Apply
    • Sherlock Holmes/James Moriarty
    • Sherlock Holmes & James Moriarty
    • Sherlock Holmes & John Watson
    • Sherlock Holmes/John Watson
    • Sherlock Holmes
    • James Moriarty
    • John Watson
    • Original Male Character(s)
    • Friends to Enemies
    • Hurt Sherlock Holmes
    • Hurt/Comfort
    • Heavy Angst
    • Power Imbalance
    • Possessive Behavior
    • Caring John Watson
    • Serious Injuries
    • Concussions
    Summary

    Sherlock finds himself at the mercy of his oldest friend while he's concussed and bleeding to death. James is willing to help him but only if the detective asks him directly.

    Easy, right?
    Not when Sherlock Holmes decides to put everyone's life before himself.

     

    (This story takes place many years into the future where everything has inevitably gone wrong and James and Sherlock are no longer friends. John Watson also makes an appearance. Naturally James is not his biggest fan.)

    Language:

    Words:
